ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the laptop manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "facebook" TEXT /* Facebook handle of the manufacturer */,
  "twitter" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the manufacturer */,
  "instagram" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the laptop category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screens" (
  "screen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screen type */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the laptop */,
  "screen_type" TEXT /* Type of screen technology (e.g., IPS Panel Retina Display) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the screen */,
  "refresh_rate" INTEGER /* Refresh rate of the screen */,
  "touchscreen" INTEGER /* Whether the screen is a touchscreen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpus" (
  "cpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPU model */,
  "cpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the CPU */,
  "cpu_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the CPU */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CPU manufacturer */,
  "number_of_cores" INTEGER /* Number of cores in the CPU */,
  "number_of_threads" INTEGER /* Number of threads in the CPU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpus" (
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU model */,
  "gpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the GPU manufacturer */,
  "vram" INTEGER /* Amount of video random access memory (VRAM) in the GPU */,
  "gpu_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the GPU */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "os_versions" (
  "os_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OS version */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the operating system version */,
  "end_of_support_date" TEXT /* End of support date for the operating system version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laptop model */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of laptops in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last replenished */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for each inventory item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for each inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laptop model */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended laptop */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "laptop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laptop model */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward available for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)
